author: anon-59ff128d
content: Fixed: (1) CHANGELOG reorganized with proper [0.2.5] header, deduplicated entries, correct categorization. (2) Root README: updated --confirm description (per-file not per-change), --dedent (whitespace not just spaces). (3) ripsed-core README: removed 'pure logic with no I/O' claim, added undo module, fixed example. (4) ripsed-fs README: updated discovery description (always parallel), updated locking (PID staleness). (5) ripsed-json README: added size limits mention and schema versioning.
